ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game is played */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and state where the venue is located */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee_1" TEXT /* Name of the first referee */,
  "referee_2" TEXT /* Name of the second referee */,
  "referee_3" TEXT /* Name of the third referee */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the event belongs to */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter in which the event occurred */,
  "time_remaining" TEXT /* Time remaining in the quarter when the event occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "shot_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the shot from the basket */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot (e.g., two-point, three-point) */,
  "rebound_type" TEXT /* Type of rebound (e.g., offensive, defensive) */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., made, missed, foul) */,
  "possession_team" TEXT /* Team in possession at the time of the event */,
  "ball_control_player" TEXT /* Player with ball control at the time of the event */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team at the time of the event */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team at the time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Player's role (e.g., starter, bench) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks in the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player's status (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., shot, rebound, foul) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Subcategory of the event type (e.g., two-point shot, three-point shot, offensive rebound, defensive rebound) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_player_map" (
  "event_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-player mapping */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., shooter, passer, blocker) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_player_map_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_player_map_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_player_map_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* User's name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_map" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_map_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_map_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permission_map" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permission_map_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permission_map_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
